appraisal_events.evidence: Il transmit séance tenante la requête à sa femme. (Il n'avait jamais d'avis qu'après sa femme, ... son rôle particulier était de mettre à exécution les désirs, ainsi que les désirs des fidèles.)
appraisal_events.explanation: The narrator underscores that M. Verdurin defers to Mme Verdurin and functions as an executor of others’ wishes, not as a decider, locally lowering his authority.

status_effects.explanation: He is portrayed as lacking independent judgment and merely carrying out desires, which weakens his local authority.
